steps.sql:
SELECT d FROM t1
     WHERE a=99
       AND b IN (200,205,201,204)
       AND c IN (304,302,309,308);

EXPLAIN
    SELECT d FROM t1
      WHERE a IN (98,99,100,101)
        AND b=200 AND c=300;

SELECT d FROM t1
  WHERE a=100
    AND b IN (200,201,202,204)
    AND c IN (300,302,301,305)
  ORDER BY +d;
